scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n auth,roster,request,user,analytics,gateway -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:roster" "npm run dev:request" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:analytics" "sleep 2 && npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n auth,roster,request,user,analytics,gateway -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:roster" "npm run dev:request" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:analytics" "sleep 2 && npm run dev:gateway"
